name: ifm-practitioners
description: Search IFM's public practitioner directory by location and extract listing-card contact fields, with optional full-detail enrichment through a persistent browser session.

inputs.name: lat
inputs.note: Optional manual latitude to skip geocoding.

inputs.name: lon
inputs.note: Optional manual longitude to skip geocoding.

inputs.name: proxy
inputs.note: Optional residential proxy URL. Do not commit the value.

inputs.name: ignore_https_errors
inputs.note: Useful for SSL-inspection residential proxies when their CA is not installed in the browser profile.

auth.note: Uses public IFM directory pages. A persistent browser session may need one headed Cloudflare verification before unattended reuse.

verification_result: Warmed browser listing run returned 3 records in 10.46s with 153 total available. Warmed detail run returned one enriched profile in 18.71s with top-level detail_url, 10 health concerns, and 7 coursework values. Fresh residential-proxy run handled TLS but still returned a Cloudflare challenge after 21.51s.
known_risks: IFM uses Cloudflare managed challenge. New headless or plain HTTP sessions can be challenged.
Residential proxy support is useful for reachability but did not guarantee fresh-session access in the tested IFM run.
Use --headed for first-run verification, RESIDENTIAL_PROXY_URL where allowed, and --ignore-https-errors for SSL-inspection proxies unless the proxy CA is installed.
This is DOM extraction from public listing/detail pages, not a private JSON API.
Direct requests are intentionally not used because they returned Cloudflare 403 during discovery.
